isEndOfHighlighting.description: Set to true if the day is the end of a highlighted date range.

isEndOfPreviewing.description: Set to true if the day is the end of a previewing date range.

isFirstVisibleCell.description: If true, day is the first visible cell of the month. Either the first day of the month or the first day of the week depending on showDaysOutsideCurrentMonth.

isHighlighting.description: Set to true if the day is in a highlighted date range.

isLastVisibleCell.description: If true, day is the last visible cell of the month. Either the last day of the month or the last day of the week depending on showDaysOutsideCurrentMonth.

isPreviewing.description: Set to true if the day is in a preview date range.

isStartOfHighlighting.description: Set to true if the day is the start of a highlighted date range.

isStartOfPreviewing.description: Set to true if the day is the start of a previewing date range.

outsideCurrentMonth.description: If true, day is outside of month and will be hidden.

classes.description: Override or extend the styles applied to the component.

disableHighlightToday.description: If true, today's date is rendering without highlighting with circle.

disableMargin.description: If true, days are rendering without margin. Useful for displaying linked range of days.

draggable.description: If true, the day can be dragged to change the current date range.

isVisuallySelected.description: Indicates if the day should be visually selected.

showDaysOutsideCurrentMonth.description:
If true, days outside the current month are rendered:

- if fixedWeekNumber is defined, renders days to have the weeks requested.

- if fixedWeekNumber is not defined, renders day to fill the first and last week of the current month.

- ignored if calendars equals more than 1 on range pickers.

outsideCurrentMonth.description: Styles applied to the root element if `outsideCurrentMonth=true`

startOfMonth.nodeName: the root element if `day` is the start of the month

endOfMonth.nodeName: the root element if `day` is the end of the month

firstVisibleCell.nodeName: the root element if `day` is the first visible cell of the month

lastVisibleCell.nodeName: the root element if `day` is the last visible cell of the month

hiddenDayFiller.nodeName: the root element if it is an empty cell used to fill the week
